questions: What is the patient's weight in kilograms?
What is the patient's exact age in months?
Does the patient have tachypnea, dyspnea, respiratory distress, or SpO2 < 90%? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have severe pneumonia and acute respiratory failure (SpO2 < 90% and PaO2 < 60 mmHg with oxygen therapy)? (Yes/No)
Is the patient on mechanical ventilation? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have persisting septic shock (SBP < 90)? (Yes/No)
